channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender bass V 1966 Jan - sunburst — $6,894.85
item.description:
$6,894.85 · Mint · Fender Vintage Soul

Raro basso V ORIGINALE 100% proveniente dalla collezione privata di Flavio Camorani in vendita esclusivamente perchè sostituito da medesimo modello ed anno ma di colorazione candy apple red.
Strumento famoso che ha presenziato a tante mostre museali Fender Vintage e fotografato sul libro ufficiale 'Our vintage soul vol 3' a pag . 104 , è corredato di accessori e custodia originale.
Leggerissimo con la 5' corda DO, scala corta, fra i primissimi del suo genere dalla nascita ancora con dots anzichè block/binding.
Suona esattamente come un precision bass della stessa età avendo caratteristiche e materiali componentistici identici.
Certificato e garantito da Flavio Camorani, vera opportunità collezionabile da musicisti esigenti.
E' stato pubblicato mesi fa e subito ritirato da inserzione in quanto un interessato sardo aveva opzionato l'acquisto poi mai realizzatosi, quindi riproposto ora NON perchè difettato, ma solo per mancata parola di un promesso acquirente.
Massima serietà
Flavio 338 8784320

item.title: Fender jazz bass matching-head 1969 - Olympic white — $17,254.98
item.description:
$17,254.98 · Excellent · Fender Vintage Soul

In vendita per conto di un importante collezionista privato Italiano leggerissimo basso Fender Jazz risalente al 1969 in rara colorazione Olympic white con paletta in tinta con il corpo totalmente originale in condizioni estetiche 9,9 su 10....nearmint !

Lo strumento non presenta dissaldature, nessuna imperfezione nè riparazione, tasti ancora semi-nuovi e le accessorie coppe metalliche bridge/pickup covers a corredo.

Elettronica e condensatori intoccati e timbrati correttamente, il battipenna è un tartarugato in celluloide senza fratture nè imperfezioni e presenta il poggia-dita originale.

Strumento dal grande suono, leggerissimo ed assolutamente da collezionare oltre che pronto da utilizzare comunemente in palchi e live.

Viene fornito in custodia dell'epoca 1969 'for fender' ma con lieve sovrapprezzo è disponibile anche con una custodia mint-condition u.s.a. del''anno corretto alla nascita del basso.

E' garantito ed accompagnato da certificazione di garanzia ed autenticità rilasciata da Flavio Camorani (Fender vintage museum Italy - Our vintage soul books).

Posso spedire a carico del compratore offrendo in omaggio i tre libri 'Our vintage soul' nel prezzo finale con dedica autografa dell'autore se desiderato.

Massima serietà, posso accettare permute ESCLUSIVAMENTE Fender vintage originali (no custom-shop/masterbuild) costruiti entro e non oltre il 1975 valutando e trattando professionalmente e con criterio corretto le richieste; non si accettano sconti a ribasso in quanto è oggetto venduto per conto-terzi.

Ulteriori informazioni o fotografie direttamente da Flavio Camorani in forma privata.

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 1965 - sunburst — $16,064.16
item.description:
$16,064.16 · Excellent · Fender Vintage Soul

Leggerissimo basso elettrico risalente all'aprile 1965 in condizioni straordinariamente near-mint in colorazione sunburst con tutti gli accessori, elettronica completa, vernici ed hardware originali .

Viene consegnato in una custodia dell'epoca corretta 'for fender' ma è disponibile su richiesta anche una custodia originale black-tolex logo del 1965.

Lo strumento è accompagnato da certificazione di garanzia rilasciata da Flavio Camorani.

Oggetto assolutamente da collezione per le sue condizioni conservative, ma altrettanto stupendo da suonare ovviamente.

Vendo per conto terzi quindi posso accettare eventuale permuta con strumento vintage fender originale pre-1975 ma non posso effettuare sconti.

Spedizione a carico del compratore, nell'acquisto verranno compresi in omaggio i tre libri della collana 'Our vintage soul' con dedica autografa

Massima serietà.

Fender vintage museum Italy - Our vintage soul

item.title: Fender Musicmaster Bass 1978 Custom Black — $1,905.31
item.description:
$1,905.31 · Very Good · Vintage Freak - Amps Guitars Basses

For sale is a fantastic Fender Musicmaster Bass — a simple, lightweight and extremely musical short-scale Fender with loads of character.

This bass is set up with flatwound strings, giving it a warm, round and very vintage tone. It has a strong Motown-style vibe: deep, woody, punchy and smooth, with a beautiful fundamental and a soft attack that sits perfectly in a mix.

It is especially great for pick playing. With flats, the bass has that tight, focused thump and old-school clarity that works beautifully for soul, funk, pop, indie, studio work and classic vintage bass lines.

The instrument is fully working, properly set up and ready to play. It is comfortable, inspiring and very easy to get a great tone from — a real plug-and-play bass with honest Fender charm.

Details:

  • Model: Fender Musicmaster Bass
  • Short-scale Fender bass
  • Flatwound strings
  • Warm, round vintage tone
  • Great Motown-style character
  • Excellent for pick playing
  • Comfortable and easy to play
  • Fully working and ready to play
  • Great for studio, recording and live use

A wonderful Fender Musicmaster Bass with flatwounds — warm, punchy, soulful and full of vintage character. A small bass with a big voice.

item.title: 【used】Atelier Z / DAL-4 4.225kg #036520【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $2,204
item.description:
$2,204 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Atelier Z is a professional-grade bass brand widely loved by professional bassists both in Japan and internationally.

It's known that many prominent musicians, including Tomohito Aoki, KenKen, BOH, and JINO, use Atelier Z basses.

This is the DAL-4 model, characterized by its chambered body.

The body top is made of ash, and the body back is made of alder.

Thanks to the chambering, it possesses a rich mid-low range.

The neck and fingerboard are made of maple.

The pickups are ATELIER-Z JBZ-4, and the preamp is ATELIER-Z EQ/M.

It features a 2-band EQ, allowing you to achieve the so-called "scooped" sound.

The brand's signature high playability is also present.

It's a versatile JB-type bass with excellent playability and a wide range of sound-shaping possibilities.

The frets have approximately 80% remaining.

The truss rod is in good condition.
The neck is in good condition.
The body and paintwork show some small dents of about 2.0mm on the back of the body. There are scratches on the pickguard, likely from picking.
The electronics are in good condition.
No obvious modifications were observed.
Controls: Neck pickup volume, bridge pickup volume (push/pull - active/passive), treble, bass (boost only)
Nut width: 39.3mm
String spacing: 19.0mm
Scale length: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: Unknown
Country of manufacture: JAPAN

This guitar will be delivered after being adjusted for easy playability by a GIB craftsman.

Accessories: Semi-hard case, PU fence

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Terao

Product Photos: Tei

GIB 3-Month Warranty Included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

●Re-Buyback Price Guarantee

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

●Defect Warranty

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.

* If the warranty certificate does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you use our trade-in service at the time of purchase, the sales price will be 10% off. (Consignment items are excluded. This offer is only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the selling price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We will ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Yamaha active bass- BBG5A 1997 - Amber Burst + gigbag — $893.11
item.description:
$893.11 · Excellent · The Grand Optimist

Yamaha BBG5a in Amber Burst

MADE in July of 1996/for to market 1997

This bass is one of the BB (Broad Bass) series for those who wanted a hi-quality 5-string at a good price. This is an instrument that has been out of production for almost 20 years. Yet this actual Bass looks and plays like its brand new.

An alder body, rosewood fingerboard, and maple neck and despite these “classic” woods it is very light and very comfortable. The pickups are Yamaha branded with active electronics and quality 3 band EQs far beyond expectations.

It is a truly versatile instrument and, in spite of its more expensive big brothers, it is by no means “lost in the mix” but it comes out well in the overall sound, with a powerful but non-invasive fifth string. You can easily play from funk (very valid also for slappatori thanks to the rather wide string at 1.8 mm.) To blues passing through jazz and heavy metal.

item.title: AIO S11-7 7-String Electric Bass - Trans Black GS-044 — $749
item.description:
$749 · Brand New · All In One Guitar [AIO Custom & Wolf]

You will be receiving the exact guitar pictured.

We will install a New alkaline Duracell battery and will Setup with a New Set of D'addario XL Nickel Wound Strings ( 18-32-45-65-100-130 guage ).

To make sure you get the best-tailored setup, below are the setup options you can choose from, and also, please let us know your level of playing/playing style and your age(Just curious for our records :))

1. Medium Action 4/32 inch on treble side5/32 on bass side
2. Medium Low Action 3/32 -4/32
3.Low Action (more low on bass side) 2.5/32- 3 /32

Also, Please choose the neck relief option as well.

A. Traditional Style(more like Fender type)
B. More relief so the low to high is very even.

**Please note, for setup #3, weather and temperature changes during shipping could affect our setup(buzzing issue). And if you play it with heavy stroke with #3 setup then there will be a buzz on the fingerboard. Generally, when you get your instrument it might be slightly changed(Intonation, neck relief, and fret level) during the delivery with the carrier, especially the tuning.To To make sure you get the best-tailored setup, below are the setup options you can choose from, and also, please let us know your level of playing/playing style and your age(Just curious for our records

This stunning S11 7-string bass is one of our absolute favorites. Not only does it look incredible, but its playability and tone are superb. Expect warm, tight low-end, silky highs, and an even sound throughout the neck. Each bass undergoes a professional setup before it leaves our shop, ensuring it feels comfortable in your hands. The ebony fingerboard adds a growl and punch that's hard to beat. Buy with confidence!

Specifications

  • Body: Constructed from Solid African Mahogany, providing a deep, rich tone with excellent sustain. Topped and backed with Solid Flame Maple, this bass not only sounds incredible but also looks stunning in its finish.
  • Neck: Solid Maple Neck-Through design reinforced with Solid Walnut (4 pieces Maple and 3 pieces Walnut). This configuration offers superb stability and sustain, making it a joy to play.
  • Fingerboard: Sleek Ebony, delivering a smooth and responsive playing experience.
  • Headstock: Topped with Solid Flame Maple, adding a touch of elegance and visual appeal. 
  • Top and Back: Solid Flame Maple
  • Position Marks: Side dots to keep your playing on point. 
  • Tuners: Grover tuners for reliable tuning stability, ensuring your instrument stays perfectly in tune.
  • Truss Rod: Dual action, allowing for precise neck adjustments to suit your playing style. 
  • Scale Length: 35''
  • Battery: Powered by dual 9V batteries, providing consistent and reliable performance.
  • Neck thickness at !st Fret:  22.9 mm
  • Neck thickness at 12th Fret: 24.33 mm 
  • Bridge width: 3 7/8'' 
  • Bridge Spacing: 15 mm 
  • Nut Width: 60.9 mm
  • Width at the 12th Fret: 86mm
  •  Pick Up: AIO Custom Single Space Mini Humbucker (Coiled by Accurate CNC machine) 
  • Lower Bout: 11''
  • Upper Bout: 13.5" 
  • Total Length of Bass: 46.5"  

Controls

2-Position Mini Toggle Switch: Selector for on and off the volume

Master Volume push/pull for active or passive

Center Tapped Front and Rear Pickup Mix Volume

Center Tapped Bass (only works at an Active position)

Center Tapped Middle (only works at an Active position)

Center Tapped Treble (only works at an Active position)


About All in One Guitars

We run a humble one-stop guitar shop in Los Angeles. We are a team of great guitar/bass players, builders and repairers. The owner of AIO and all of the staff and luthiers are professional musicians with 30-40 years of experience. You can find many guitars/basses anywhere but we are confident that the ones from our shop are better than the ones you get from big corporate shops. Anyone that has done business with All in One Guitars can confirm that we focus on playability so our setup standard is incredibly high. Our guitar set-ups are custom shop quality and the playability and feel is off the charts. You are paying not just for the price of the instrument, but also for our close attention and care for it. We deal with honesty and integrity and we make sure that the instrument feels good in your hands. We want to share our quality instruments and let everyone enjoy and love music with the ease of playing.

We hope that you can make purchases with the confidence of knowing that not a single instrument leaves our store without receiving our utmost care.

2. Medium Low Action 3/32 -4/32
3.Low Action (more low on bass side) 2.5/32- 3 /32

Also, Please choose the neck relief option as well.

A. Traditional Style(more like Fender type)
B. More relief so the low to high is very even.

**Please note, for setup #3, weather and temperature changes during shipping could affect our setup(buzzing issue). And if you play it with heavy stroke with #3 setup then there will be a buzz on the fingerboard. Generally, when you get your instrument it might be slightly changed(Intonation, neck relief, and fret level) during the delivery with the carrier, especially the tuning.To To make sure you get the best-tailored setup, below are the setup options you can choose from, and also, please let us know your level of playing/playing style and your age(Just curious for our records

This stunning S11 7-string bass is one of our absolute favorites. Not only does it look incredible, but its playability and tone are superb. Expect warm, tight low-end, silky highs, and an even sound throughout the neck. Each bass undergoes a professional setup before it leaves our shop, ensuring it feels comfortable in your hands. The ebony fingerboard adds a growl and punch that's hard to beat. Buy with confidence!

Specifications

  • Body: Constructed from Solid African Mahogany, providing a deep, rich tone with excellent sustain. Topped and backed with Solid Flame Maple, this bass not only sounds incredible but also looks stunning in its finish.
  • Neck: Solid Maple Neck-Through design reinforced with Solid Walnut (4 pieces Maple and 3 pieces Walnut). This configuration offers superb stability and sustain, making it a joy to play.
  • Fingerboard: Sleek Ebony, delivering a smooth and responsive playing experience.
  • Headstock: Topped with Solid Flame Maple, adding a touch of elegance and visual appeal. 
  • Top and Back: Solid Flame Maple
  • Finish: Gloss
  • Position Marks: Side dots to keep your playing on point. 
  • Tuners: Grover tuners for reliable tuning stability, ensuring your instrument stays perfectly in tune.
  • Truss Rod: Dual action, allowing for precise neck adjustments to suit your playing style. 
  • Scale Length: 35''
  • Battery: Powered by dual 9V batteries, providing consistent and reliable performance.
  • Neck thickness at !st Fret:  22.9 mm
  • Neck thickness at 12th Fret: 24.33 mm 
  • Bridge width: 3 7/8'' 
  • Bridge Spacing: 15 mm 
  • Nut Width: 60.9 mm
  • Width at the 12th Fret: 86mm
  •  Pick Up: AIO Custom Single Space Mini Humbucker (Coiled by Accurate CNC machine) 
  • Lower Bout: 11''
  • Upper Bout: 13.5" 
  • Total Length of Bass: 46.5"  

Controls

2-Position Mini Toggle Switch: Selector for on and off the volume

Master Volume push/pull for active or passive

Center Tapped Front and Rear Pickup Mix Volume

Center Tapped Bass (only works at an Active position)

Center Tapped Middle (only works at an Active position)

Center Tapped Treble (only works at an Active position)


About All in One Guitars

We run a humble one-stop guitar shop in Los Angeles. We are a team of great guitar/bass players, builders and repairers. The owner of AIO and all of the staff and luthiers are professional musicians with 30-40 years of experience. You can find many guitars/basses anywhere but we are confident that the ones from our shop are better than the ones you get from big corporate shops. Anyone that has done business with All in One Guitars can confirm that we focus on playability so our setup standard is incredibly high. Our guitar set-ups are custom shop quality and the playability and feel is off the charts. You are paying not just for the price of the instrument, but also for our close attention and care for it. We deal with honesty and integrity and we make sure that the instrument feels good in your hands. We want to share our quality instruments and let everyone enjoy and love music with the ease of playing.

We hope that you can make purchases with the confidence of knowing that not a single instrument leaves our store without receiving our utmost care.

item.title: 【used】Freedom Custom Guitar Research / S.JB-4st NAT 2013 4.025kg #00637【GIB Yokohama】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $3,892
item.description:
$3,892 · Good · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Freedom is a Tokyo-based guitar workshop that enjoys overwhelming support from professional musicians in Japan, and in recent years, its name has begun to resonate overseas.

Originally highly regarded for its repair work, the workshop now focuses on manufacturing, and its creations are loved by many musicians for their high quality and rational design sense.

All basses from this brand are manufactured in Tokyo.

Through strict quality control, the wood used is carefully selected, and any wood that does not meet the standards is not used in the products.

This level of quality control is possible precisely because it is a small workshop.

In that sense, the quality is fundamentally different from that of products made in large factories.

This is a 4-string JB replica model.

Manufactured in 2013.

The body is made of ash, and the fretboard is rosewood.

This is a combination that has become increasingly popular in recent years.

The pickups are original.

While possessing a wide range, it also includes a powerful midrange, which is precisely why Fender vintage guitars are so appealing.

This is a superb instrument that perfectly encapsulates its charm while incorporating modern elements such as stainless steel frets.

A rare MIJ brand that consistently delivers high quality.

Please check it out in-store.

Fret remaining: approximately 90%.

Truss rod condition: good.

Neck condition: good.

Body and paint surface: minor scratches, small dents, and weather checking are visible. There is approximately 20.0mm of paint peeling on the body back and side.

Electronics condition: good.

No obvious modifications were observed.

Controls: Neck PU volume, Bridge PU volume, Master tone
Nut width: 38.1mm
Bridge string spacing: 20.0mm
Scale: 34 inches
Year of manufacture: 2013
Country of manufacture: JAPAN

GIB's craftsmen will adjust it for easy playability before delivery.

Accessories: Gig bag

Text: Tomoki Hayakawa

Inspection 담당: Hirayama

Product Photos: Tei

GIB 3-Month Warranty Included

◯GIB, TONIQ Warranty Information

●Lifetime Free Maintenance

Instruments purchased from our store are eligible for lifetime free "String Vibration Setup" (normally ¥4,400). (Reservation required)

・Please present your warranty card with your name filled in.

・Only applicable to the person who purchased the instrument at a GIB or TONIQ physical store or online shop.

・Please bear the cost of shipping and other miscellaneous expenses.

●Re-purchase Price Guarantee

If you sell your purchased item within 6 months of purchase, we guarantee the buyback price. The price is 50% for new items and 70% for used items.

●Defect Warranty

Basic Co., Ltd. provides a warranty against defects for products sold by the company. With the exception of some items such as consigned goods, we will repair (or refund if repair is not possible) any malfunctions that occur during normal use within a certain warranty period from the date of purchase free of charge.

The warranty period is 3 months for used products and 1 year for new products.

Please note that the following cases will incur a charge even within the warranty period:

* Malfunctions and damage caused by transportation, movement, dropping, etc.

* Replacement of consumables.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by fire, earthquake, salt damage, gas damage, or abnormal voltage.

* Malfunctions and damage caused by handling contrary to the precautions described in the instruction manual.

* Malfunctions or damage to parts repaired or modified by a party other than our company.

* If the warranty certificate does not have your name, model name, serial number, etc. filled in, or if the wording has been altered.

* If the warranty certificate is not presented or is lost.

(Warranty is only provided for purchases made in Japan.)

● Up to 15% OFF with Trade-in

When you use our trade-in service at the time of purchase, the sales price will be 10% off. (Consignment items are excluded. This offer is only applicable if the trade-in value is 15% or more of the selling price.)

Furthermore, if you trade in an instrument eligible for our monthly buyback campaign, the discount rate will be 15%.

We will ship with sufficient packaging.

We also ship internationally.

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

If you return a product, you will be responsible for all shipping and customs fees.

Note: All electronic devices, such as effect pedals and amplifiers, are set for use in Japan.
Please be sure to check the voltage and power specifications of your country before purchasing and using.

item.title: Fender American Professional Fretless Jazz Bass 3-Colour Sunburst Pre-Owned — $1,627.19
item.description:
$1,627.19 · Excellent · The Rock Inn

Pre-owned in excellent condition, this Fender American Professional Fretless Jazz Bass is finished in a 3-Colour sunburst and features a lined rosewood fretboard. This bass is playing very well and delivers that classic fretless tone.

There are only very light signs of where on this 2016 model with some light patina and marks. The protective plastic is mostly intact and it is sounding great.

Comes with original hardshell case and Certificate of Authenticity. Please note that the fabric hinge has been cut so the case opens all the way.

At Fender, we live and breathe electric instruments. We never rest - pushing craftsmanship to its limits, we design, test and endlessly experiment to create the best instruments on the planet. The Jazz Bass, a refinement of concepts first introduced in the Precision Bass, is the earliest example of this philosophy in action. Evolved for today's musician, the American Professional Jazz Bass Fretless combines modern features and materials with Fender's craftsmanship and expertise to produce a truly contemporary bass.

item.title: 【new】Sadowsky / MX20 UV5 OWT/R 4.1kg #SMX A 000261-26【GIB Hyogo】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,524
item.description:
$1,524 · Excellent · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Sadowsky is a high-end New York brand with top-tier musicians such as Marcus Miller and Will Lee as clients. (Titles omitted)

Previously, the Metroline Express was manufactured in Japan, but as Warwick took over the distribution of Sadowsky products, manufacturing shifted to a factory in China.

While keeping the selling price down, high quality is maintained, making it a very unique product in its price range.

This is the MX20 UV5, the first PB-type guitar in the MX series.

The body is made of lightweight solid Okoume, the neck is made of Roasted Maple, and the fingerboard is made of Morado (Pau Ferro).

This is a standard combination in the MX series.

The construction has been thoroughly considered for excellent body balance and sound projection, resulting in a very refined balance that is comfortable to hold.

The back of the neck has a satin finish, providing a smooth and pleasant feel.

The pickup is a "Sadowsky passive P-Style pickup."

It has the powerful, forceful projection characteristic of PB-type basses, yet delivers a clear sound without muddy bass tones.

The preamp features the familiar 2-band EQ.

You can significantly boost the bass and treble frequencies with the touch of a button.

The circuit board of this preamp is almost identical to that of the top-of-the-line models priced around 1 million yen.

Copper foil shielding is also applied, resulting in surprisingly low noise.

These points are extremely significant advantages when choosing an MX series bass.

Even in this price range, Roger Sadowsky's uncompromising commitment to instrument making is evident.

While offering the ultra-smooth playability characteristic of Sadowsky, the sound is unmistakably that of a P-bass.

It outputs a modern tone that beautifully blends a robust punch with sweet, airy, and clear treble tones.

Based on the traditional PB design, this guitar incorporates modern elements, embodying Roger Sadowsky's philosophy.

SPECS

Scale Length: 34" (864 mm) Long Scale
Body Shape: P-Style body
Body Wood: Okoume, Solidbody
Neck Wood: Roasted Maple (C-Shape, Bolt-On)
Fingerboard Wood: Morado
Inlays: White dot inlays
Fingerboard Radius: 12"
Nut: Sadowsky Just-A-Nut III
Nut Width: 1.875" (47.5 mm)
Nut String Spacing: Nut string spacing (all strings): 1.54" / 39.1 mm
Neck width at 12th fret: 2.7" / 68.6 mm neck width at 12th fret
Neck width at last fret: 3.1" / 78.7 mm neck width at last fret
Neck thickness at 1st fret: 0.86" / 21.8 mm neck thickness at 1st fret
Neck thickness at 12th fret: 0.93" / 23.6 mm neck thickness at 12th fret
# Frets: 20 Nickel Silver (width: 0.094" (2.4 mm) / height: 0.051" (1.3 mm))
Neck Pickup: Sadowsky passive P-Style pickup
Bridge Pickup: None
Preamp: Active Sadowsky 2-way electronics (Bass and Treble boost)
Controls: Volume / Treble / Bass
Push/Pull Function: Push/pull function at Bass knob for preamp bypass
Machine Heads: Sadowsky Light Open Gear Machine Heads
Security Locks: Sadowsky S-Security Locks
Bridge: Sadowsky bridge with quick string release
Bridge Total String Spacing: 2.83" / 72mm
Hardware Color: Chrome
Strings: Sadowsky Silver Label, Stainless Steel, 045 - 130
Protector: Sadowsky Fretboard Protector
Tools: Hex key tools
Bag / Case: Sadowsky PortaBag
Made In: China

Accessories: Original gig bag, warranty card

item.description:
$2,381.64 · Very Good · Filip's Shit

Rare 1981 Kramer Stagemaster in Sunburst finish. One of the last models, Kramer Stagemaster in Sunburst finish. Most players claim, that the Stagemaster series have been the best of the alu-necks. item.title: Schecter Raiden Custom-4 Black Bass Guitar Pre-Owned — $468
item.description:
$468 · Very Good · The Rock Inn

Pre-owned in very good condition, this Schecter Raiden Custom-4 is a great playing bass at a very approachable price point. This bass delivers some thumping tones from a pair of SuperRock pickups.
There are some light signs of wear including some marks and finish rubbing. The frets show minimal wear and this action is set nice and low.
The Raiden Custom 4 brings plenty of heavy bass tone with its Schecter SuperRock MM pickups. The active 2-band EQ adds fuel so you can customize and shape your perfect dialed-in sound. A Master Blend control improves on the versatility paired with its Master Volume knob.

Schecter offers the thunderous Raiden Custom 4 Electric Bass at a staggeringly good price. With a 34-inch scale, and neck held in place with 6 bolts, the Raiden Custom 4 bass guitar packs a serious punch. The Schecter Raiden Custom 4 is crafted with a mahogany body that offers plenty of deep bass power to pump your tone out cleanly and forcefully. The multi-laminate maple and walnut neck on the Custom 4 adds strength to the bass, and produces clear and unobstructed tone. With its 24 X-jumbo frets, and rosewood fretboard, the Raiden Custom 4 bass gets the job done with style and strength.

The Raiden bass is equipped with Schecter's top-load string-thru bridge, providing the tension required for drop-tunings. The top-load string-thru bridge also makes changing the Raiden bass' strings a snap, so you can get back to doing what you love best: rocking the low end. Schecter completes the Custom 4 bass with black chrome hardware, Schecter tuners, creme headstock binding, and mother-of-pearl dot inlays.

TMB30 The Talman bass series combines the re-emergence of a historic Ibanez body shape with powerful genre-hopping versatility. TMB electronic system paves the road to a variety of classic tones. ****Product Features**** - Maple neck The Maple neck provides stability and bright tonal character. - Jatoba fretboard Jatoba has a reddish brown color and produces a rich mid range with a crisp high end. - Medium frets Medium sized frets enhance the accuracy of your notes. - Poplar body Poplar used as body wood delivers a well-balanced tone with incredible thickness. - Dynamix PJ pickups Dynamix PJ pickups deliver clarity and fullness - B10 series bridge The B10 bridge allows fully adjustable intonation and solid tuning stability. ****Special Features**** - 30 inch scale Basses with a scale of 34Â” are known as Â”long-scaleÂ”. It features a 30Â” scale which is commonly known as a Â”short scaleÂ” bass. This is highly desirable for guitarists who sometimes double as bass players. item.title: Ibanez Adam Nitti Signature 6 String Electric Bass w/Bag - Blue Burst Gloss (ANB306) — $2,499.99
item.description:
$2,499.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

ANB306 Beyond his steady schedule of teaching, clinics, producing, and commandeering his own musical endeavors, Adam Nitti has spent decades performing and recording with countless celebrated contemporary jazz artists. In the process heÂ’s built a reputation as being one of the most respected and sought after bassists in music today. The ANB is the culmination of AdamÂ’s far-reaching expertise as a player, and the lengthy experience Ibanez brings as the one of the worldÂ’s most advanced bass companies. - Premium - Â”Designed to InspireÂ”, all Ibanez Premium series are manufactured with select tone woods, high-profile electronics, hardware and dedicated skills of craftsmanship and care in details for your musical journey. The richness of sound, stunning appearance and unrivalled playability of the Ibanez Premium series will open the gate of your reservoir of inspiration. ****Product Features**** - 5pc Maple/Purpleheart neck The 5pc Maple/Purpleheart neck provides tonal clarity and superior attack. - Purpleheart fretboard The Purpleheart fretboard emphasizes the beauty and the rich tonal character of this bass. - Medium frets with Premium fret edge treatment Medium sized frets enhances the accuracy to your notes. The Premium Fret Edge Treatment offers a super smooth, comfortable performance. - Quilted Maple top / Ash body The Quilted Maple top displays a beautiful wood grain and the Ash body delivers a pleasant brightness and rich sustain. - BartoliniÂ® xxM56C pickups The BartoliniÂ® XXM56C pickups provide bottomless lows and low-mids along with a tonal complexity for an excellent bite and growl. Full and warm for vintage tone, the XXM56C pickups enhance the natural voice of your bass. - BartoliniÂ® NTMB+F ANB Custom 3-band EQ The NTMB+F preamp is specially modified for Adam's taste and offers fully independent bass, mid and treble controls with very low noise and a wide boost/cut range. The sound is extremely clear and transparent. The 3-way mid frequency selector provides 250Hz, 500Hz, and 800Hz choices for more sonic variety and the passive tone trim pot, housed in the control cavity, enables players to fine tune the overall brightness. - GotohÂ® machine heads GotohÂ® machine heads provide superior precision, a smooth feel, and excellent tuning accuracy. - Hipshot A style bridge The HipshotÂ® A Style bridge has 18mm string spacing, slightly wider than the standard 16.5mm SR-5 string spacing. The extra space offers players plenty of freedom for techniques like slap, without compromising player comfort. - 3-way Mid frequency switch The 3-way Mid frequency switch allow players to change the mid-tone between 250, 450, and 700 Hz. - Gig bag included It comes with Ibanez gig bag which is designed specifically to fit and protect this instrument. ****Special Features**** - Neck-through construction The neck-through construction contributes to massive sustain and smooth access to high fretboard positions.

K5 As the bassist and one of the founding members of the band Korn, Fieldy has created a style all his own since day one, carving out a sound that has become an integral part of KornÂ’s legacy as the pioneers of the Nu-metal genre. His legendary K5 basses have been used for every Korn performance since its release in 2002. ****Product Features**** - 5pc Maple/Walnut neck The 5pc Maple/Walnut neck provides tonal clarity and superior attack. - Rosewood fretboard Rosewood fretboard provides a well-balanced solid tone with a focused mid range. - Medium frets Medium sized frets enhance the accuracy of your notes. - Nyatoh body Nyatoh used as the body wood provides a rich mid-low end. - IBZ ADX5 pickups Ibanez ADX5 pickups deliver an unlimited arsenal of mayhem-inspiring bass tones. - Vari-mid 3-band EQ The Vari-mid 3-band EQ features a variable mid-frequency control which allows you to dial in an incredibly wide range of sounds. - Hipshot machine heads Hipshot machine heads offer incredible tuning stability. - EB-7 bridge The classical EB-7 bridge is super steady with its die-cast structure yet light weight by adopting aluminum base plate.

item.description:
$379.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

SR300E For 30 years the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics. ****Product Features**** - 5pc Maple/Walnut neck The 5pc Maple/Walnut neck provides tonal clarity and superior attack. - Jatoba fretboard Jatoba has a reddish brown color and produces a rich mid range with a crisp high end. - Medium frets Medium sized frets enhance the accuracy of your notes. - Nyatoh body Nyatoh used as the body wood provides a rich mid-low end. - PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups Developed by Ibanez, the exposed pole pieces of the PowerSpan Dual Coil pickups produce a stronger signal and increase the response of the higher frequencies without sacrificing low end. The result is a tone rich in harmonic detail and dynamic expression. - Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ The Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ is our latest refinement on the concept of simple, straightforward, no-nonsense EQ control. The Boost and Cut for the Mid Control are each centered on slightly different frequencies, an innovation that delivers a preset range of the most favorable bass tones. - Accu-cast B120 series bridge The B120's extra-wide string slots can accommodate even the heaviest of gauges. The walls and channels of the new bridge plate effectively Â”trapÂ” the saddles, ensuring perfect directional uniformity. - 3-way Power Tap switch Accessed by the 3-way Power Tap switch, the pickups offer a choice of three tonal personalities: A rich humbucker sound, a pure single-coil sound, or an enhanced single coil soundÂ— fattened by lows from the humbucker pickups.

item.title: Ibanez SR Iron Label 5 String Electric Bass - Multiscale - Black Flat (SRMS625EXBKF) — $999.99
item.description:
$999.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

SRMS625EX To the newcomer, the multi-scale concept may appear a bit unusual, but the biggest surprise may be how comfortable players become within a minute or two of playing the instrument. The different fret-to-bridge distances enhance tonality, creating a better sounding bass. - Iron Label - The Iron Label line was originally developed with metal and nothing but metal in mind. We modded and tweaked until we gotÂ toÂ theÂ heaviest-hittingÂ metalÂ axesÂ weÂ’veÂ everÂ built. TheyÂ’re purposefully spartan, and you wonÂ’t find a feature here that doesn't contributeÂ directlyÂ toÂ aÂ bone rattling,Â earth shatteringÂ tones these guitars pump out. Carrying forward that same philosophy, the next generation of Iron Label guitars take this raw metal energy to a completely new level. They sport totally blacked out looks, and their supercharged electronics amounting to some of the heaviest-swinging metal axes weÂ’ve ever produced. ****Product Features**** - 5pc Maple/Walnut neck The 5pc Maple/Walnut neck provides tonal clarity and superior attack. - Ebonol fretboard Ebonol is a synthetic material which is made from layers of black paper and phenolic resin. An Ebonol fretboard provides tight and bright sound. - Medium frets Medium sized frets enhance the accuracy of your notes. - Okoume body The Okoume body provides a bright and solid sound. - BartoliniÂ® BH2 pickups The BartoliniÂ® BH2 pickups provide a tight bottom-end, punchy mid-range, and smooth response. The dual-coil style configuration maximizes articulation and a long blade pole piece widens the magnetic field, providing balanced string-to-string pickup response. - Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ The Ibanez Custom Electronics 3-band EQ is our latest refinement on the concept of simple, straightforward, no-nonsense EQ control. The Boost and Cut for the Mid Control are each centered on slightly different frequencies, an innovation that delivers a preset range of the most favorable bass tones. - MR5 bridge The Mono-Rail V is the ultimate bridge for bass string isolation. Each bridge is independently and securely locked down to the body for maximum vibration transfer without interference. - EQ bypass switch (passive tone control on treble pot) The EQ bypass control offers precision tonal adjustments, including a switch to choose passive-only operation. When the EQ bypass is activated, the treble tone control knob becomes the global tone control for the passive circuit. - 3-way Mid frequency switch The 3-way Mid frequency switch allow players to change the mid-tone between 250, 450, and 700 Hz. ****Special Features**** - Multi scale The multi scale construction equalizes tension of each string and it helps to create a more Â”aliveÂ”, open tone. But the design also improves player comfort. The multi scale construction ergonomically coordinates with the way a player's hand angles as it moves up and down the neck, facilitating quick, comfortable playing action.

item.title: Ibanez Gio SR 4 String Electric Bass - Mahogany Oil (GSR100EXMOL) — $229.99
item.description:
$229.99 · Brand New · Musician Madness

THIS ITEM WILL SHIP IN 7-10 DAYS

GSR100EX For 30 years the SR has given bass players a modern alternative. With its continued popularity, Ibanez is constantly endeavoring to answer the wider needs of a variety of players, at a variety of budgets. But no matter what the specs, the heart is the same-SR continues to excite with its smooth, fast neck, lightweight body, and perfectly matched electronics. - Gio - A guitar doesn't have to cost a lot to sound great. The GIO series was developed for players who want Ibanez quality and performance in a more affordable package. Not only do they look and play better than many other offerings in their price range, but they are held to the same standards and come with warranty is the same as Ibanez's more expensive models. ****Product Features**** - Maple neck The Maple neck provides stability and bright tonal character. - Jatoba fretboard Jatoba has a reddish brown color and produces a rich mid range with a crisp high end. - Medium frets Medium sized frets enhance the accuracy of your notes. - Poplar body Poplar used as body wood delivers a well-balanced tone with incredible thickness. - PPD4 pickup PPD4 pickups deliver rich and powerful sound - B10 series bridge The B10 bridge allows fully adjustable intonation and solid tuning stability.

item.title: Fender American Standard Precision Bass with Rosewood Fretboard 2016- Olympic White — $1,349.99
item.description:
$1,349.99 · Excellent · Chias's Gear Depot

Fender American Standard P-Bass with rosewood fretboard and olympic white finish in excellent condition from 2016. Has original Custom Shop '60s Split Single-Coil Precision Bass pickup. Fully functional with no issues. Frets have minimal wear. It has lived in the studio for years and has been cared for. Comes with original hardshell case.

item.title: Fender Custom shop Jazz bass 1989 - Daphne blue — $2,314.61
item.description:
$2,314.61 · Excellent · Wickland Gallery


The original ‘88/89 has been modded into a stunning playing / looking bass.


Early Custom shop Jazz bass, with several modifications that justify lower pricing.

Originally Daphne blue, refinished in a deep pink colour, and then again back to the original colour, all professionally done.

The neck binding was stripped and redone as perloid, with a nice touch at the top of the fingerboard saying “L’arbre chantant” (the singing tree in French).

the “V” serial number is typical of early Custom Shop (they only started in 88 so this must be a very early one). The stamps are all original, but the year is not very legible at all.

Gold tuners,knobs, control plate and screws are original to the bass, new gold bridge installed

Scratchplate imported from the states which is 62-66 period correct.

Fender customshop vintage 60's pickups

The gold bridge cover is not the original one.

A battery compartment was added at the back and a toggle switch to the control plate as an active circuit was installed, but now the original circuit reinstated and it’s all passive.

Non-original Fender moulded case included, strap locks and leather strap.

Weight is 4.4 Kgs.

item.title: Rickenbacker 4003S 2015 - Present - Mapleglo — $1,778
item.description:
$1,778 · Excellent · Cam's Used Gear

This very clean Rickenbacker 4003s features quality-of-life updates only seen in newer models such as a more modern-designed bridge, single dual-action truss rod, and thinner neck profile. Original hard case included

item.title: 【new】Sadowsky / MX20 UV5 BLK/R 4.29kg #SMX A 000246-26【GIB Hyogo】【price included SHIPPING & IMPORT TAX & VAT】 — $1,524
item.description:
$1,524 · Excellent · Bass Shop Geek IN Box

Sadowsky is a high-end New York brand with top-tier musicians such as Marcus Miller and Will Lee as clients. (Titles omitted)

Previously, the Metroline Express was manufactured in Japan, but as Warwick took over the distribution of Sadowsky products, manufacturing shifted to a factory in China.

While keeping the selling price down, high quality is maintained, making it a very unique product in its price range.

This is the MX20 UV5, the first PB-type guitar in the MX series.

The body is made of lightweight solid Okoume, the neck is made of Roasted Maple, and the fingerboard is made of Morado (Pau Ferro).

This is a standard combination in the MX series.

The construction has been thoroughly considered for excellent body balance and sound projection, resulting in a very refined balance that is comfortable to hold.

The back of the neck has a satin finish, providing a smooth and pleasant feel.

The pickup is a "Sadowsky passive P-Style pickup."

It has the powerful, forceful projection characteristic of PB-type basses, yet delivers a clear sound without muddy bass tones.

The preamp features the familiar 2-band EQ.

You can significantly boost the bass and treble frequencies with the touch of a button.

The circuit board of this preamp is almost identical to that of the top-of-the-line models priced around 1 million yen.

Copper foil shielding is also applied, resulting in surprisingly low noise.

These points are extremely significant advantages when choosing an MX series bass.

Even in this price range, Roger Sadowsky's uncompromising commitment to instrument making is evident.

While offering the ultra-smooth playability characteristic of Sadowsky, the sound is unmistakably that of a P-bass.

It outputs a modern tone that beautifully blends a robust punch with sweet, airy, and clear treble tones.

Based on the traditional PB design, this guitar incorporates modern elements, embodying Roger Sadowsky's philosophy.

SPECS

Scale Length: 34" (864 mm) Long Scale
Body Shape: P-Style body
Body Wood: Okoume, Solidbody
Neck Wood: Roasted Maple (C-Shape, Bolt-On)
Fingerboard Wood: Morado
Inlays: White dot inlays
Fingerboard Radius: 12"
Nut: Sadowsky Just-A-Nut III
Nut Width: 1.875" (47.5 mm)
Nut String Spacing: Nut string spacing (all strings): 1.54" / 39.1 mm
Neck width at 12th fret: 2.7" / 68.6 mm neck width at 12th fret
Neck width at last fret: 3.1" / 78.7 mm neck width at last fret
Neck thickness at 1st fret: 0.86" / 21.8 mm neck thickness at 1st fret
Neck thickness at 12th fret: 0.93" / 23.6 mm neck thickness at 12th fret
# Frets: 20 Nickel Silver (width: 0.094" (2.4 mm) / height: 0.051" (1.3 mm))
Neck Pickup: Sadowsky passive P-Style pickup
Bridge Pickup: None
Preamp: Active Sadowsky 2-way electronics (Bass and Treble boost)
Controls: Volume / Treble / Bass
Push/Pull Function: Push/pull function at Bass knob for preamp bypass
Machine Heads: Sadowsky Light Open Gear Machine Heads
Security Locks: Sadowsky S-Security Locks
Bridge: Sadowsky bridge with quick string release
Bridge Total String Spacing: 2.83" / 72mm
Hardware Color: Chrome
Strings: Sadowsky Silver Label, Stainless Steel, 045 - 130
Protector: Sadowsky Fretboard Protector
Tools: Hex key tools
Bag / Case: Sadowsky PortaBag
Made In: China

Accessories: Original gig bag, warranty card

Text: Kaigo Kawami

Product photos: Muragishi

Manufacturer's warranty included

(Warranty is only valid for purchases made in Japan)

●Price includes VAT & Duties & Shipping Fee
Free Shipping Worldwide. All import duties and taxes are included in the price. There are no hidden fees upon delivery.

item.description:
$1,381.86 · Excellent · Graham's Gear Outlet

Spector NS Ethos 5 bass guitar

Very good used condition.

With Spector gigbag.


Neck thru design, 35" scale, Aguilar pickups and preamp, thin neck for a Spector.
Really nice bass to play, only selling as I no longer need a 5-string.


Can post with specialist courier.

item.title: 1980 Ibanez Japan MC940 Musician Series Neckthrough Fretless Bass (Dark Stain) — $1,850.39
item.description:
$1,850.39 · Good · Cool Old Guitars

Made in Japan as part of the professional grade "Musician" series of basses, this is a 1980 fretless model that was factory loaded with a pair of Super 4 pickups. Neck-through-body construction on mahogany with bookmatched ash top attached to a maple and walnut neck with a fret-less ebony fingerboard with small offset white dot position markers and a darkened ash headstock, this one weighs 4.6kg's. 
The active module was removed from this one before it arrived with us so it's a simple passive loadout with all the other knobs doing nothing. Loaded with flatwounds and playing great, no breaks or repairs and plays with a straight neck and fully functional truss. There's some wear to the fretboard but nothing structural.

item.title: 1980's Hondo Alien Headless Bass — $597.60
item.description:
$597.60 · Very Good · Cool Old Guitars

Just look at this stupid thing, you know you want it. Plays nicely, works well, includes the original hardcase, looks really stupid, weighs 2.9kg's.

item.title: 1985 Fernandes Japan FPB-PJ120 PJ Precision Bass w/EMG's (Candy Apple Red) — $892.79
item.description:
$892.79 · Good · Cool Old Guitars

One of the flagship models from the 1985 Fernandes Japan catalog. The Fernandes FPB-PJ120 features a solid alder body bolted to a maple neck with a dark rosewood fingerboard, this one weighs 4.3kg's. Factory loaded with a diecast bridge system, active EMG pickups and a brass nut, other than a new 9v battery clip this one appears all original. Given a restring and basic setup prior to listing, the neck is straight and the truss adjusts well, the frets are smooth with plenty of life.

item.title: Schecter Charles Berthoud CB-6 Signature 6-String Bass — EMG — Excellent — $1,249
item.description:
$1,249 · Excellent · Savannah Bass

Selling my Schecter Charles Berthoud CB-6 signature 6-string bass. This is a very capable modern 6-string with a comfortable neck, clear electronics, and a ton of range.

Specs:

  • 6-string bass
  • Charles Berthoud signature model
  • EMG 45HZ passive humbucking pickups
  • 16.5mm string spacing
  • Active electronics
  • Natural / satin finish
  • Case/gigbag: Soft Gigbag
  • Weight: 9lb 10oz

Condition is Excellent to Mint. Very clean, fully functional, and well cared for. Great option for extended-range players, tapping, chord work, solo bass, prog, fusion, metal, or anyone who wants a practical 6-string without boutique pricing.

Ships packed safely and insured.

item.title: Lakland Skyline 44-51 — Candy Apple Red — Excellent — P Bass — $1,199
item.description:
$1,199 · Excellent · Savannah Bass

Selling my Lakland Skyline 44-51 in Candy Apple Red. This is Lakland’s take on the early P-bass / single-coil Precision-style design, with excellent build quality and a big, old-school voice.

Specs:

  • 4-string Lakland Skyline 44-51
  • Candy Apple Red finish
  • 34" scale
  • Passive electronics
  • Lakland Split Coil NeoPunch hum-cancelling pickup
  • La Bella 760FL flats, .043–.104
  • Weight: 9lb 2oz

Ships packed safely and insured.

item.title: Spector Euro CST 4 Poplar Burl — $2,899
item.description:
$2,899 · Excellent · Gear Of Glory

Spector Euro CST 4 String Bass in mint condition. Low action and plays like a dream! Comes with gigbag.

Featuring an advanced design with premium solid tonewoods and cutting-edge electronics, the Spector Euro CST represents the flagship model of the company's much-loved Euro series of electric bass guitars. These instruments have long been coveted for their sleek, curvaceous body shape, unmatched playability, and impeccable tone, offering discerning bassists a boutique level of style, quality, and appointments at production prices. Available in 4- and 5-string versions in an array of eye-popping finishes, the Euro CST features a fast 3-piece hard rock maple through neck and body wings crafted of European ash topped with gorgeously figured poplar burl. Your fingers will fly on the smooth-as-glass ebony fingerboard, as the Spector aluminum locking bridge, brass nut, and Gotoh tuning machines provide the foundation for rock-solid sustain and intonation. EMG's state-of-the-art PJX pickups are onboard, as is Spector's Darkglass-designed Legacy preamp - a potent combination that serves up a vast arsenal of sensational (and endlessly tweakable) tone.

item.title: FENDER 1975 Jazz Bass, Olympic White [368852] (06/30) — $5,302.37
item.description:
$5,302.37 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

A classic from the '70s. A 1975 Jazz Bass that fully showcases the charm of ash and maple has just arrived.

This particular instrument retains a high degree of originality in key areas such as the body finish and electronics. The sun-faded Olympic White?this is exactly what youfd call gage-worn charm.h
The pot dates are 137-7451 ~ 2, with the tone pot alone reading 137-7438. The pickups were gray bobbins consistent with the model year, but the dates could not be verified due to them being stuck to the foam. The neck date was legible up to g02,h but the rest was too faded to read. Taking all factors into account, including the serial number, we have determined this to be a 1975 model.
Repair history includes refretting, nut replacement, correction of a bulge on the 1st fret fingerboard, and refinishing of the fingerboard and neck back. The refretting and neck back finish are of the highest quality. The neck back, in particular, is of such exceptional quality that it could be called a work of art. Naturally, low action is a given, achieving perfect playability.
Additionally, extra frets have been added. The finger rest appears to have been replaced as well.

Even with the frets installed, the total weight is 4.46 kg, which is relatively light for an instrument of this era?another attractive feature.
This is a lively instrument that fans of the f70s should definitely check out. Donft miss this opportunity.

Condition Grade: B+: Some minor scratches, but no issues for normal use

Serial Number: 368852
Year of Manufacture: 1975
Country of Manufacture: United States
Case: Original hard case
Weight: 4.46 kg
Truss rod: No issues
Fret Wear: No issues; in like-new condition

item.title: Roscoe Lg3006 [6471] (06/30) — $3,762.55
item.description:
$3,762.55 · Good · ISHIBASHI MUSIC

Wefve just received a high-end Roscoe bass from North Carolina?itfs in excellent condition and is practically unused.

Featuring a compact body and fully equipped with Bartolini electronics, it delivers an exceptionally clear tone despite its 34-inch scale.
With Buckeye Burl on the top and Ash on the back, this bass is built to deliver a sound thatfs virtually foolproof.

The neck features a maple and purpleheart laminate?a classic combination for high-end basses?and currently shows no signs of warping, twisting, or muffled tones. Since it has been used very little, there is virtually no fret wear, so you can enjoy playing it with complete confidence.
